ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss and score) */,
  "tournament_stage_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournament stage */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the season */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Home or away game indicator */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_stage_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics are being recorded */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds collected by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "to" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  "three_pct" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team (e.g., Guard, Forward) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "class_year" TEXT /* Class year of the player (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament stage */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament stage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the tournament was held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach on the team (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the coach belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the game */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Player, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, healed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Result of the game (win/loss and score)
Foreign key referencing the tournament stage

Reference to the game in which the stats were recorded
ID of the player whose statistics are being recorded

Position of the coach on the team (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach)
